name: Foot in the Fire Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Sift flour and sugar; set aside.
3. In a saucepan, bring margarine, cocoa, and water to a boil; remove from heat.
4. In a large bowl, mix all remaining cake ingredients. Add the sifted flour mixture and cocoa mixture, stirring well.
5. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 9x13-inch pan.
6. Bake for 20 to 30 minutes, or until a clean toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. While the cake is baking, prepare the frosting: In a saucepan, bring margarine, cocoa, and evaporated milk to a boil; remove from heat and add powdered sugar, vanilla extract, cinnamon, and salt. Beat until smooth.
8. Frost the cake as soon as it comes out of the oven. Let it cool slightly before cutting, if possible. Enjoy this delicious cake!
